6:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"These operations are differentiable, allowing gradient-based learning of logical rules."}]
7:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Neural Architecture for Pattern Matching"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Consider a pattern matching task: given a sequence, identify if it matches a regular expression."}]
9:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Traditional approaches:"}]
a:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"DFA compilation"}],": Fast but inflexible"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Neural sequence models"}],": Flexible but slow"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Tensor logic offers a middle ground:"}]
c:["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# Simplified tensor logic pattern matcher"}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"def"}]," ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-title function_","children":"tensor_match"}],"(",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-params","children":"pattern, sequence"}],"):\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# Pattern is a learned tensor representing the regex"}],"\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# Sequence is embedded as token tensors"}],"\n\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# State transitions are learned tensor operations"}],"\n    state = initial_state\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"for"}]," token ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"in"}]," sequence:\n        state = transition(state, token, pattern)\n        state = normalize(state)  ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# Maintain probabilistic interpretation"}],"\n\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"return"}]," accept(state)\n"]}]}]
d:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Applications"}]
e:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Learning regex from examples"}],": Instead of hand-writing patterns, learn them from data"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fuzzy pattern matching"}],": Handle noisy inputs gracefully"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compositional generalization"}],": Combine learned patterns to handle novel situations"]}],"\n"]}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Limitations"}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Computational cost"}],": Tensor operations are more expensive than discrete DFA transitions"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Interpretability"}],": Learned patterns are harder to debug than hand-written regex"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Theoretical guarantees"}],": Unlike DFAs, learned matchers don't have formal correctness proofs"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Future Directions"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The most promising direction is neuro-symbolic integration: use neural networks for perception and pattern learning, but compile to symbolic representations for verification and deployment."}]
13:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"This mirrors the brain's dual-process theory: fast, intuitive pattern matching (System 1) and slow, deliberate reasoning (System 2)."}]
14:["$","$L15",null,{"children":["$","$16",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@17"}]}]
17:null
